data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- The Impact Forum/
data.description: The Impact Forum, a nonprofit organization co-founded by Adam and Gila Milstein, recently hosted a fundraising event in Miami Beach where they successfully raised more than $1.1 million. The event aimed to combat antisemitism and show support for Israel. The funds collected will be used towards these efforts to fight prejudice and support the country. This initiative is part of The Impact Forum's ongoing mission to address these critical issues and make a positive difference in the community. The event took place on April 10, 2026, and the generous contributions from attendees will greatly aid in their cause.

data.title: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Announces Pricing of Tender Offers for Any and All of its Outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052
data.description: In Midland, Texas on April 10, 2026, Diamondback Energy, Inc. disclosed the details of its tender offers. The company, listed as NASDAQ: FANG, has priced the Offers to purchase any outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052. The Reference Yield and Consideration for the Notes were calculated as of 2:00 p.m., New York City time on April 10, 2026, as per the Offer to Purchase dated April 6, 2026. Diamondback Energy, Inc. offered to buy back its 2051 Notes and 2052 Notes for cash as per the specified terms.

data.title: TTC Electrical and Trades Workers Deliver Strong Strike Mandate
data.description: In Toronto, members of CUPE 2 have voted in favor of strike action, with a staggering 99% supporting a strike mandate if needed to secure a fair collective agreement at the Toronto Transit Commission (TTC). CUPE 2 president Sumit Guleria emphasized the unity among members in seeking a new agreement, highlighting the desire for fair and respectful treatment during negotiations. The overwhelming support for strike action demonstrates the strong determination of members to advocate for their rights in the bargaining process.

data.title: Bitcoin could be used to pay tolls as Iran seeks to implement new route fees for oil tankers passing through the Hormuz Strait. Geopolitics changing global trade.
data.description: Amidst changing global trade routes due to geopolitical tensions, Iran is considering implementing Bitcoin tolls for oil tankers passing through the vital Strait of Hormuz. This move could revolutionize the use of cryptocurrency in international transactions and trade.

data.title: CUPE 1600 members vote overwhelmingly in favour of strike action at Toronto Zoo
data.description: In Toronto, members of CUPE 1600 at the Toronto Zoo have voted overwhelmingly in favor of strike action if needed to achieve a fair collective agreement. The vote resulted in 99% support for potential strike action. The president of CUPE 1600, Lynda Bongelli, emphasized the unity of the members and their commitment to reaching a fair agreement through negotiations. The members, responsible for animal care and maintaining operations at the Toronto Zoo, expressed their determination through this strong mandate.

data.title: Strategy Target Slashed To $350, But Watch These Four Crypto Treasury Stocks, TD Cowen Says
data.description: Financial services firm TD Cowen has reduced its price target for the Strategy stock (NASDAQ: MSTR) by 20.5% to $350 from the previous $440. This decision was made as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) hit $73,000 last Friday. Analysts Lance Vitanza and Jonathan Navarrete cited a "lower bitcoin price deck" and a decrease in the valuation multiple for the company's projected bitcoin gains as reasons for the revised target. The analysts forecast Strategy's BTC gain for the fiscal year 2026 at $7.87 billion, a decline from $10.17 billion in 2025. Strategy currently holds 766,970 BTC purchased at an average price of $75,700 per BTC. TD Cowen's projections assume Bitcoin will hit $140,000 by December 2026, with the company acquiring around $5 billion in Bitcoin each quarter. Additionally, TD Cowen initiated buy ratings on four crypto treasury firms in a developing industry sector that includes public Bitcoin and Ethereum. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ALL NEW TOUR! NITRO CIRCUS 2.0 TOUR PRESENTED BY RAM TRUCKS IN AUGUST 2026
data.description: Witness the unprecedented 2026 NITRO CIRCUS 2.0 TOUR, featuring over 100 mind-blowing stunts performed by a team of 20 elite athletes. Taking place in Las Vegas on April 10, 2026, the event is a collaboration between Thrill Sports, P1 Live, and RNC Entertainment. Get ready for a spectacle that defies imagination.

data.title: TELCOR Acquires Sample Healthcare to Lead AI-Driven Transformation of Revenue Cycle Operations
data.description: On April 10, 2026, in Lincoln, Nebraska, TELCOR Inc, a prominent healthcare technology solutions provider for laboratories and healthcare facilities, revealed the purchase of Sample Healthcare. This acquisition pertains to an AI workflow platform aimed at enhancing revenue cycle and clinical operations. The acquisition signifies TELCOR's strategic move to expand its offerings and technological capabilities in the healthcare sector.
